The Partygoer.NAME: The Partygoer
The Partygoer.ACTIVATE: [b]activate[/b] - Gain [b]Experience[/b] and [b]Currency[/b] equal to my [b]Points[/b], then [i]increase[/i] my [b]Points[/b] by 3.[br]
The Partygoer.DESCRIPTION: [b]Joker[/b] - Counts as any [i]number[/i] and any [i]color[/i].[br][b]On Spread[/b], [b]Activate me[/b] for each [i]other[/i] [b]Tile[/b] in the [b]Row[/b].[br][b]While Spread[/b], when [i]another[/i] [b]Tile[/b] is [b]activated[/b], also [b]activate[/b] me

The Banker.NAME: The Banker
The Banker.ACTIVATE: [b]activate[/b] - Gain [b]Experience[/b] and [b]Currency[/b] equal to my [b]Points[/b], your next [i]purchase[/i] at the [b]Shop[/b] will be [i]free[/i].[br]

The Architect.NAME: The Architect
The Architect.DESCRIPTION: [b]Joker[/b] - Counts as any [i]number[/i] and any [i]color[/i].[br][br][b]While Spread[/b], [i]if I'm not a [b]Leech[/b][/i], when you [b]Use[/b] a [b]Consumable Item[/b], [b]activate[/b] me

The Vampire.NAME: The Vampire
The Vampire.DESCRIPTION: [b]Joker[/b] - Counts as any [i]number[/i] and any [i]color[/i].[br][b]On Spread[/b] - If I am a [b]Leech[/b], I [b]Gain Points[/b] equal to the ammount of [b]Spread Points[/b] in the [b]Row[/b] I'm [b]Leeching[/b]
